Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency (Lis Pendens) And Other Relief, And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

INTERVENOR AGESONG GENESIS, LLC'S Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency (Lis Pendens) And Other Relief, And For Attorneys Fees And Costs is Off calendar. Dismissal filed on August 26, 2016 and the matter should have been set in department 501 because it implicates an alleged real property claim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
